name: update
description: Update an existing scheduled task. Use this when the user asks to change, edit, or modify a task's name, prompt, schedule, or notification settings. Requires `task_id` and `schedule_id` from `task_list`.

task_id.description: The ID of the task to update (from task_list)

schedule_id.description: The ID of the schedule to update (from task_list)

name.description: Updated short name for the task

prompt.description: Updated prompt Grok will execute on each run

cadence.description: RFC 5545 RRULE describing how often the task runs (e.g. "RRULE:FREQ=DAILY", "RRULE:FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO"). Omit / empty to run only once. Do not include DTSTART/DTEND — use time_of_day + timezone instead.

scheduled_date.description: ISO 8601 date for one-time tasks (e.g. '2026-05-25'). Required when cadence is omitted (run-once). Defaults to today if not provided.

timezone.description: IANA timezone (e.g. 'America/New_York'). Defaults to user's timezone.
